# Pouya Karimi

> Freelance developer and SEO specialist (MBA) based in Iran, working with clients worldwide. Helps teams build fast, search-friendly products that rank and convert. Bilingual site: English and Persian (fa).

## Services
- Web Development — performant, scalable apps (React, Next.js, Node.js)
- SEO — technical audits, structured data, Core Web Vitals, content strategy, local SEO, AI search/GEO
- AI & Automation — LLM integrations, AI agents, workflow automation
- Technical Consulting — architecture reviews, tech strategy, fractional CTO

## Selected work
- Cognitive Edge — AI Telegram automation (Claude + Python + n8n) that gathers, credits, categorizes, and translates daily psychology/MBA/tech news: https://pouyakarimi.ir/en/portfolio/cognitive-edge
